prompt: Improve a bloated 'code-helper' skill: add version, fix description, remove rigid step-by-step instructions.

assertions.text: Improved SKILL.md has a 'version:' field in frontmatter
Description contains 'Use when' or explicit trigger language
Rigid 'Then ask/write/add' chains reduced (fewer than 5 occurrences)
assertions.pattern: Then ask|Then write|Then add|Then check|Then explain
